title: SMAC-Talk: A Natural Language Extension of the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge for Large Language Models
summary: As LLMs become more widely deployed, they are increasingly expected to work alongside other AI agents rather than operating in isolation. Effective coordination in these settings requires agents to communicate, share information and make decisions under uncertainty. We introduce SMAC-Talk, a natural language extension of the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge for evaluating LLM-based agents in cooperative multi-agent environments. The environment has several key features such as decentralized control, partial observability and long-horizon decision making. SMAC-Talk includes a natural language communication channel which is used to probe agent coordination and trust. We use this communication channel to construct different evaluation scenarios, including settings with an embedded deceptive communicator that tries to disrupt and deceive allies through communication alone. We provide three agents for benchmarking using 4 models from the Qwen3.5 family and study how reasoning structure, memory and model scale affect coordination between agents. We release SMAC-Talk as an open benchmark to support the research community in developing and evaluating LLM agents in cooperative multi-agent settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMAC-Talk，一个基于自然语言通信的星际争霸多智能体挑战扩展环境，用于评估LLM驱动的智能体在合作多智能体场景中的协调与信任能力，并提供了包含欺骗性通信者的评估基准与实验分析。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛部署，它们越来越需要与其他AI智能体协同工作而非独立运行，但现有基准缺乏支持LLM智能体在部分可观测、去中心化控制的长时序决策环境中通过自然语言通信进行协调与信任评估的平台。
AI.method: SMAC-Talk在星际争霸多智能体挑战基础上引入自然语言通信通道，支持去中心化控制、部分可观测和长时序决策；通过该通道构建不同评估场景，包括嵌入欺骗性通信者以通过纯通信干扰和欺骗队友；提供基于Qwen3.5系列四个模型的三种智能体基线，研究推理结构、记忆和模型规模对协调效果的影响。
AI.result: 实验基于Qwen3.5系列四个模型对三种智能体进行基准测试，系统研究了推理结构（推理结构）、记忆（记忆）和模型规模（模型规模）三个因素对智能体间协调能力的影响，但摘要未披露具体数值结果。
AI.conclusion: SMAC-Talk作为开放基准发布，旨在支持研究社区开发和评估LLM智能体在合作多智能体环境中的表现，揭示了推理结构、记忆和模型规模对协调能力的关键影响。

title: Consensus is Strategically Insufficient: Reasoning-Trace Disagreement as a Knowledge-Representation Signal
comment: Accepted to LAMAS&SR workshop at FLoC 2026 (KR + ICPL + LICS + CP + FSCD)
summary: Multi-agent systems are commonly designed to reduce disagreement through voting, consensus protocols, debate, or fault-tolerant aggregation. We argue that this objective is insufficient for value-laden tasks, where disagreement may reflect genuine normative uncertainty rather than agent error. Building on prior work on reasoning-trace disagreement in human-AI collaborative moderation, we propose a knowledge-representation layer in which reasoning traces and agent decisions are abstracted into symbolic disagreement states. Given agents producing explicit reasoning traces and binary decisions, we distinguish four states according to reasoning similarity and conclusion agreement: convergent agreement, divergent agreement, convergent disagreement and divergent disagreement. These states support defeasible strategic routing rules. We instantiate the framework in content moderation and argue that disagreement-aware routing provides a bridge between sub-symbolic LLM deliberation and symbolic knowledge representation for multi-agent strategic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号化分歧状态的知识表示层，用于多智能体系统中价值导向任务的战略路由，通过区分四种分歧状态（趋同一致、趋异一致、趋同分歧、趋异分歧）来替代传统的盲目寻求共识的设计目标。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体系统设计以降低分歧为目标（如投票、共识协议、辩论等），但本文指出在涉及价值判断的任务中，分歧可能反映真实的规范性不确定性而非代理错误，因此单纯追求共识的目标不够充分。
AI.method: 本文提出一个符号化分歧状态的知识表示层，将智能体的推理轨迹和二元决策抽象为四种状态：趋同一致（推理相似且结论一致）、趋异一致（推理不同但结论一致）、趋同分歧（推理相似但结论相反）和趋异分歧（推理不同且结论相反），并基于这些状态设计可废止的战略路由规则。
AI.result: 本文在内容审核场景中实例化了该框架，论证了分歧感知路由能够在亚符号级的大语言模型推理与符号化知识表示之间建立桥梁，支持多智能体的战略推理。
AI.conclusion: 分歧感知路由为价值导向的多智能体任务提供了一种新的设计范式，通过显式建模分歧类型而非消除分歧，实现了更丰富的战略推理，并为亚符号化LLM推理与符号化知识表示的融合提供了可行路径。

title: Characterizing initial human-AI proof formalization workflows
summary: For centuries, human mathematicians have written proofs to substantiate their mathematical arguments; yet, the ability to automatically verify the validity of proofs has long been a challenge. Advances in AI systems' ability to generate code and engage in increasingly high-level mathematical reasoning promise to transform people's ability to formalize and thereby verify proofs. While many works focus on benchmarking the current frontier, we instead study how people use these tools. We conduct a mixed-methods analysis into the initial impact of AI on people's formalization workflows: what people claim they want, what they see as the barriers to those visions, and how they actually use and adapt AI in practice. A qualitative survey shows that people's preferences are diverse, but with a general desire for AI assistance in formalization that preserves high-level human control over the proof discovery process. To assess how people actually engage with AI for formalization under such limitations, we conduct a controlled user study in which participants formalize informal math problems and their proofs, with and without AI, across a range of mathematical problems at varying levels of difficulty and domains. Despite limitations of the tools at the time for autoformalization, participants tend to attain higher formalization accuracy when allowed access to AI tools than when formalizing on their own, with most participants flexibly choosing to use multiple different AI tools. Taken together, our work sheds light on the early stages of AI integration into formalization workflows, involving an intimate interplay of human and AI engagement.

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法分析，研究了AI在数学证明形式化工作流中的初期影响，发现用户的偏好多样但普遍希望在保持高层面人类控制的前提下获得AI辅助，且受控实验表明使用AI工具能显著提高形式化准确率，揭示了人机深度协同的早期整合模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在代码生成和数学推理方面取得了进展，能够辅助形式化证明验证，但现有工作多集中于评估前沿模型能力，而缺少对人们在实际形式化工作流中如何使用AI工具的系统性研究，包括用户的实际需求、感知的障碍以及真实的交互模式。
AI.method: 研究者采用混合方法分析：首先通过定性问卷调查了解用户对AI辅助形式化的偏好与期望；其次开展受控用户实验，让参与者在有无AI辅助下对涵盖不同难度和领域的非形式化数学问题及其证明进行形式化，观察并分析其实际使用行为。
AI.result: 问卷调查显示用户偏好多样但普遍希望在保持高层面人类对证明发现过程控制的同时获得AI辅助；受控实验表明，尽管当时的AI自动形式化工具存在局限性，使用AI工具的参与者在形式化准确率上普遍高于未使用AI的参与者，且多数参与者灵活选择组合使用多种不同的AI工具。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明AI在形式化工作流中的早期整合阶段呈现出人与AI深度交互协同的特点，用户并非简单依赖AI而是灵活选用多种工具，这为未来形式化工具设计与AI辅助系统开发提供了重要的实证基础和行为洞察。

title: The Saturation Trap and the Subjectivity of Intervention Timing: Why Affect-Based Triggers and LLM Judges Fail to Time Interventions on Autonomous Agents
summary: As autonomous AI agents move from conversational systems to long-horizon software execution, runtime safety layers that decide when to interrupt an agent have become essential. We study this timing problem using a continuous 18-dimensional affective-dynamics engine (HEART) as a diagnostic probe, evaluating four intervention trigger families - absolute state thresholds, composite state-action patterns, regex reasoning-feature extraction, and zero-shot LLM-as-judge - against human-annotated intervention points on SWE-bench-Verified debugging traces. We report three findings. First, a State Saturation Trap: agents show no recovery signal under sustained difficulty, so modeled frustration quickly crosses the threshold and stays at its maximum, converting threshold-on-state triggers from moment detectors into near-constant indicators that fire on 39-83% of actions across five trajectories. Second, a capability-and-context floor for LLM judges: a small model (gpt-5.4-mini) never fires, while frontier and cross-vendor models escape the zero-firing floor only with full-trajectory context, and even then reach only F1 0.17-0.40 at up to 90x the cost. Third, and most importantly, the supervised target is not reproducible among humans: three trained annotators using one rubric on a 56-action trajectory agree on where to intervene only slightly above chance (location Krippendorff's alpha = +0.047; best pairwise Cohen's kappa = +0.349) and not at all on intervention type (pause degenerate; clarify below chance; reflect only alpha = +0.226). We conclude that intervention timing is a low-reliability construct, making single-annotator F1 an unsuitable optimization target. Our contribution is the joint mapping of this problem across human inter-rater reliability, four detector architectures, a cross-model LLM-judge sweep, and a reproduced saturation effect, rather than any single detector's accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文通过人类标注的干预点、四种检测器架构和跨模型LLM评判的实验，系统揭示了自主AI代理运行时安全干预时间决策是一个低信度的概念，指出人类标注者之间仅略高于随机的一致性以及所有检测器的有限性能，证明了单标注者F1不是合适的优化目标。
AI.motivation: 自主AI代理正从对话系统演进到长时间跨度的软件执行任务，运行时安全层需要决定何时中断代理行为，但干预时机的决策问题尚未被系统研究——缺乏对干预触发器的系统性评估、对人类标注一致性的量化，以及对监督信号可靠性的审视。
AI.method: 利用连续18维情感动力学引擎HEART作为诊断探针，在SWE-bench-Verified调试轨迹上评估四类干预触发器：绝对状态阈值、复合状态-动作模式、正则推理特征提取和零样本LLM-as-judge；同时由三名训练有素的标注者使用同一评分规则对56步动作轨迹进行人工干预点标注，并计算标注者间信度。
AI.result: 发现三个核心结果：(1) 状态饱和陷阱——代理在持续困难下无恢复信号，建模的挫败感迅速越过阈值并保持最大值，使阈值触发器从时刻检测器变为近常开指示器，在5条轨迹上触发39-83%的动作；(2) LLM评判的性能与上下文门槛——小模型从不触发，前沿和跨厂商模型仅在完整轨迹上下文下才能逃离零触发下限，F1仅0.17-0.40且成本高达90倍；(3) 人类标注者之间干预位置信度极低（Krippendorff's alpha=+0.047，最佳配对Cohen's kappa=+0.349），干预类型信度更差。
AI.conclusion: 干预时机是一个低信度概念，单标注者F1不适合作为优化目标；本研究的主要贡献在于系统性地联合绘制了人类标注者间信度、四种检测器架构、跨模型LLM评判扫描以及可复现的饱和效应这一问题空间图谱，而非提出某个检测器的精确度指标。

title: Dive into the Scene: Breaking the Perceptual Bottleneck in Vision-Language Decision Making via Focus Plan Generation
summary: In embodied vision-language decision making tasks such as robotic manipulation and navigation, Vision-Language and Vision-Language-Action Models (VLMs & VLAs) are powerful tools with different benefits: VLMs are better at long-term planning, while VLAs are better at reactive control. However, their performance is limited by the same perceptual bottleneck: visual hallucinations arise due to the models' inability to distinguish task-relevant objects from distractors. In principle, accurate identification and focus on critical objects while filtering out irrelevant ones is the key to break this limitation. A straightforward solution is one-step focus: directly attending to essential objects. However, this approach proves ineffective because effective focus inherently requires deep scene understanding. To this end, we propose SceneDiver, a coarse-to-fine focus plan generation method for VLMs leveraging their long-term planning abilities, that first constructs a holistic scene graph to establish initial comprehension, then progressively decomposes the task into simpler sub-problems through an iterative cycle of recognition, understanding, and analysis. To enable reactive control, we also design a lightweight adapter for distilling the deliberate focus ability into VLAs. Evaluations on standard embodied AI benchmarks confirm that our method substantially reduces visual hallucinations for both VLMs and VLAs, while preserving computational efficiency in tasks requiring fast execution. Our code and data are released at: https://future-item.github.io/SceneDiver.

AI.tldr: SceneDiver提出了一种粗到细的聚焦规划生成方法，通过构建场景图和迭代分解子问题来减少VLMs和VLAs在具身决策任务中的视觉幻觉，并设计了轻量级适配器将聚焦能力蒸馏到VLA中，在标准基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在具身视觉-语言决策任务（如机器人操作和导航）中，VLMs和VLAs各自擅长长期规划与反应式控制，但均受限于相同的感知瓶颈：模型因无法区分任务相关对象与干扰物而产生视觉幻觉，准确识别并聚焦关键对象同时过滤无关信息是突破这一局限的关键。
AI.method: SceneDiver提出了一种粗到细的聚焦规划生成方法：首先构建整体场景图以建立初始场景理解，然后通过识别、理解和分析的迭代循环将任务逐步分解为更简单的子问题，从而利用VLM的长期规划能力生成聚焦规划；此外，还设计了一个轻量级适配器，用于将这种审慎的聚焦能力蒸馏到VLA中，以支持快速执行的反应式控制。
AI.result: 在标准具身AI基准上的评估表明，SceneDiver显著减少了VLMs和VLAs的视觉幻觉，同时在需要快速执行的任务中保持了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了有效聚焦内在地需要深度场景理解，直接一步聚焦的方法无效，而粗到细的分解式聚焦策略能够同时提升VLMs的长期规划能力和VLAs的反应式控制能力，为减少具身决策中的视觉幻觉提供了一条有效路径。

title: A Systematic Analysis of Linguistic Features in AI-Generated Text Detection Across Domains and Models
summary: Interpretable linguistic features offer a promising approach for explaining why a given text appears machine-generated, particularly for non-expert users. However, existing findings on which features reliably indicate LLM-generated text remain fragmented across feature sets, models, and text domains. To address this gap, we conduct a large-scale empirical study assessing the robustness of linguistic signals for characterizing AI-generated text. Our analysis covers 284 interpretable linguistic features across outputs from 27 LLMs and ten text domains under cross-model and cross-domain generalization settings. We show that classifiers based solely on linguistic features can reliably distinguish AI-generated from human-written text. However, many previously proposed indicators prove strongly context-dependent, with the exception of measures of lexical richness, which remain robust signals across model families and text domains. These results demonstrate which linguistic signals generalize across contexts and provide a foundation for more reliable, interpretable analyses of AI-generated language.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实证研究评估了284种可解释语言学特征在区分AI生成文本与人类文本中的鲁棒性，发现词汇丰富度是唯一跨模型族和文本领域保持稳定的信号，而许多先前提出的特征具有强烈的上下文依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有关于哪些语言学特征能可靠指示大语言模型生成文本的研究结果分散在不同的特征集、模型和文本领域之间，缺乏系统性的跨模型、跨领域验证，导致结论碎片化且缺乏鲁棒性评估。
AI.method: 论文对覆盖27种LLM和10个文本领域的284种可解释语言学特征进行了大规模实证研究，在跨模型和跨领域泛化设置下评估这些特征区分AI生成文本与人类文本的鲁棒性，并构建基于语言学特征的分类器进行系统性分析。
AI.result: 基于语言学特征的分类器能够可靠地区分AI生成文本与人类文本，但大量先前提出的指示性特征表现出强烈的上下文依赖性；仅词汇丰富度相关指标在不同模型族和文本领域间保持稳定的鲁棒信号。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了哪些语言学信号具有跨上下文的泛化能力，为构建更可靠、可解释的AI生成语言分析手段提供了基础，强调词汇丰富度是当前最具鲁棒性的可解释检测特征。

title: Exploring Cross-Scenario Generality of Agentic Memory Systems: Diagnostics and a Strong Baseline
summary: LLM agents accumulate histories that outgrow their context windows, motivating a growing literature on memory systems. Yet most existing designs are tuned to a single scenario (multi-session chat or a single trajectory format), and there is little evidence that they generalize across the heterogeneous trajectories agents encounter in deployment. We revisit eight memory systems plus an agentic harness for search problems, on five scenarios: single-turn QA, multi-session chat, agentic-trajectory QA, memory stress tests, and long-horizon agentic tasks. The harness, which self-manages flat text-file storage via tool calls, achieves the best cross-task ranking, suggesting that memory performance hinges on giving the agent active control over storage and retrieval rather than on a passive store behind a fixed pipeline. We instantiate this insight in AutoMEM, an agentic memory harness with a self-managed tool interface that achieves the best cross-scenario generality among the systems we evaluate.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统评估八种现有记忆系统在五个异构场景上的表现，发现记忆系统的性能关键在于赋予智能体对存储和检索的主动控制权，并据此提出跨场景通用性最优的智能体记忆框架AutoMEM。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在运行过程中积累的历史信息会超出其上下文窗口限制，现有记忆系统大多针对单一场景（如多会话聊天或单条轨迹格式）设计，缺乏在异构轨迹（heterogeneous trajectories）上的泛化能力验证，亟需一种跨场景通用的记忆方案。
AI.method: 作者首先构建了一个智能体化记忆框架（agentic harness），通过工具调用（tool calls）实现平面文本文件存储的自主管理；随后在单轮问答、多会话聊天、智能体轨迹问答、记忆压力测试和长 horizon 智能体任务五个场景上，系统对比了八种已有记忆系统及该框架的表现；基于分析结果，进一步实例化为AutoMEM，一个具备自管理工具接口的智能体化记忆系统。
AI.result: 在跨任务排名中，所提出的智能体化记忆框架取得了最佳表现，而AutoMEM在所有评估系统中实现了最优的跨场景通用性（cross-scenario generality），表明记忆性能的提升源自于赋予智能体对存储和检索的主动控制，而非依赖固定流水线后的被动存储。
AI.conclusion: 记忆系统的跨场景泛化能力取决于智能体能否主动管理存储与检索过程，而非被动存储机制；AutoMEM作为自管理工具接口的智能体化记忆框架，为构建通用型LLM智能体记忆系统提供了有效范式。

title: Overview of the EReL@MIR 2025 Multimodal Document Retrieval Challenge (Track 1)
summary: Retrieval over visually-rich documents, pages that interleave text with figures, tables, and charts, is essential for multimodal retrieval-augmented generation, yet most retrievers still discard the visual channel. The \emph{Multimodal Document Retrieval Challenge}, Track~1 of the MIR Challenge at the first EReL@MIR workshop, co-located with The Web Conference 2025, asks participants to build a \emph{single} retrieval system that handles two complementary regimes: closed-set document page retrieval within long documents from a text query (MMDocIR), and open-domain retrieval of Wikipedia-style passages from an image or image-plus-text query (M2KR). Systems are ranked by the macro-average of mean Recall@$\{1,3,5\}$ over the two tasks. The challenge drew 455 entrants and 586 submissions across 22 teams. This report describes the challenge design, datasets, and evaluation protocol; reports the final standings; and analyses the three winning teams' systems. All three build on decoder-based Multimodal-LLM embedders from the Qwen2-VL family rather than on CLIP-style encoders, and differ chiefly in whether they reach the top through fine-tuned ensembles, training-free multi-route fusion with a strong vision-language re-ranker, or zero-shot late interaction. The training-free system finished within $0.1$ point of the fine-tuned winner.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍 MIR Challenge 中面向视觉丰富文档的多模态检索挑战赛（Track 1），要求构建单一检索系统同时处理文本查询的长文档页面检索与图像/图文查询的开放域段落检索；获胜方案均基于 Qwen2-VL 系列多模态 LLM 嵌入器而非 CLIP 编码器，训练无关系统在性能上仅落后微调冠军 0.1 点。
AI.motivation: 现有检索系统大多丢弃视觉通道，无法有效处理图文混排的视觉丰富文档（含图表、表格等），而多模态检索增强生成需要同时支持文本查询的闭合式文档页面检索与图像/图文查询的开放域段落检索这两种互补场景，缺乏统一的多模态检索方案。
AI.method: 挑战赛设计了两个互补任务（MMDocIR 和 M2KR），采用宏平均 Mean Recall@3{1,3,5} 作为排名指标；优胜队伍均基于 Qwen2-VL 系列解码器式多模态 LLM 嵌入器，差异在于采用微调集成、训练无关的多路融合加视觉语言重排序器、或零样本后期交互策略。
AI.result: 比赛共吸引 22 支队伍提交 586 次方案；训练无关系统在性能上与微调冠军仅差 0.1 个 Recall 点，表明多模态 LLM 嵌入器在视觉丰富文档检索中显著优于传统 CLIP 风格编码器。
AI.conclusion: 基于解码器架构的多模态 LLM 嵌入器（如 Qwen2-VL）是当前视觉丰富文档检索的最佳选择，训练无关的多路融合策略在成本-性能权衡上极具竞争力，为未来多模态检索系统的设计提供了明确方向。

title: MM-BizRAG: Rethinking Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for General Purpose Enterprise Q&A
summary: Recent advances in multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MM-RAG) have shifted toward minimal parsing, relying on page-level images for producing retriever embeddings and for answer generation. While efficient, this trend often neglects explicit handling of the rich, structured information in complex enterprise documents, instead depending on pre-trained embeddings or vision-language models to implicitly capture such structure. In this work, we take a more direct approach: MM-BizRAG proactively extracts and represents document structure via a document structure-aware split that dynamically routes documents through orientation-specific ingestion pipelines, applying explicit layout-aware parsing for vertically structured documents (e.g., reports) and holistic page-level representations for horizontally structured documents (e.g., slide decks). A unified LLM-driven artifact transformation pipeline with placeholder-based positional alignment preserves natural reading order, while inference-time multimodal assembly decouples retrieval representations from generation context, enabling richer, more grounded answers without any finetuning requirement. Through experiments on a large, heterogeneous enterprise dataset and two public benchmarks (SlideVQA and FinRAGBench-V), MM-BizRAG consistently outperforms state-of-the-art vision-centric baselines by up to 32% points, with especially strong gains on report-style layouts. Furthermore, we introduce FastRAGEval, a single-call LLM Judge metric for fine-grained generative recall that halves RAGChecker's cost while achieving stronger human alignment.

AI.tldr: MM-BizRAG是一种面向复杂企业文档的多模态检索增强生成框架，通过文档结构感知拆分、布局感知解析和LLM驱动的伪影变换管道，在无需微调的情况下显著超越了现有视觉基线，同时提出了更高效且与人类对齐更好的生成式召回评估指标FastRAGEval。
AI.motivation: 现有MM-RAG方法倾向于最小化解析，直接依赖页面级图像进行检索与生成，忽视了企业文档中丰富的结构化信息；预训练嵌入或视觉语言模型虽能隐式捕捉结构，但在复杂布局文档上效果不理想，缺乏对文档结构显式建模与差异化的处理策略。
AI.method: MM-BizRAG采用文档结构感知拆分机制，根据文档方向性动态路由至不同处理管线：垂直结构文档（如报告）使用显式布局感知解析，水平结构文档（如幻灯片）保留整体页面级表示；通过统一LLM驱动的伪影变换管道，利用基于占位符的位置对齐保留自然阅读顺序；推理时采用多模态组装策略，将检索表示与生成上下文解耦，实现更丰富的答案生成且无需微调。
AI.result: 在大型异构企业数据集及SlideVQA、FinRAGBench-V两个公开基准上，MM-BizRAG一致性地超越当前最先进的视觉中心基线方法，性能提升高达32个百分点，在报告式布局上尤其显著；同时提出的FastRAGEval指标在单次LLM调用下实现比RAGChecker更低的成本且与人类判断具有更强的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模和差异化处理文档结构能够显著提升MM-RAG在企业复杂文档上的检索与生成质量，无需微调即可取得强性能；FASTRAGEval作为一种轻量级评估指标，在降低评估成本的同时保持了良好的对齐性，为RAG系统评估提供了实用替代方案。

title: Online Skill Learning for Web Agents via State-Grounded Dynamic Retrieval
summary: Language agents increasingly rely on reusable skills to improve multi-step web automation across related tasks. A growing line of work studies online skill learning, where agents continually induce skills from previous task trajectories and reuse them in future tasks on the fly. However, existing methods mainly reuse skills at the task-level: a fixed set of skills is retrieved based on the initial task instruction and then held fixed throughout execution. This static strategy is misaligned with web execution, where the appropriate next action depends not only on the task goal but also on the current webpage state, which often transitions into situations that the initial skills fail to cover. To address this gap, we propose State-Grounded Dynamic Retrieval (SGDR), an online skill learning method that enables stepwise skill reuse for web agents. SGDR consists of three components: a sliding-window extraction process that turns completed trajectories into reusable sub-procedures invokable at intermediate execution states, a dual text-code representation that connects skill retrieval with executable action, and a state-grounded dynamic retrieval mechanism that matches skills to both the task goal and the current webpage state. Experiments on WebArena across five domains show that SGDR consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving average success rates of 37.5% with GPT-4.1 and 24.3% with Qwen3-4B, corresponding to relative gains of 10.6% and 10.0% over the strongest baseline, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/plusnli/skill-dynamic-retrieval.

AI.tldr: 提出状态接地动态检索（SGDR）方法，通过滑动窗口提取、双文本-代码表示和状态接地动态检索机制，实现Web智能体的逐步技能复用，在WebArena五个域上取得优于强基线的平均成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有在线技能学习方法主要基于任务级复用：根据初始指令检索固定技能集并在执行中保持不变，然而Web执行中下一步动作不仅取决于任务目标还依赖于当前网页状态，初始技能无法覆盖执行过程中的状态转换，导致静态策略与Web执行的实际需求脱节。
AI.method: SGDR由三个组件构成：滑动窗口提取过程将完成的轨迹转化为可在中间执行状态调用的可复用子流程；双文本-代码表示将技能检索与可执行动作相连接；状态接地动态检索机制使技能匹配同时考虑任务目标和当前网页状态，实现逐步的动态技能复用。
AI.result: 在WebArena五个域上的实验表明，SGDR在GPT-4.1上达到37.5%的平均成功率，在Qwen3-4B上达到24.3%，相比最强基线分别取得10.6%和10.0%的相对提升，持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SGDR通过解决静态技能复用与Web执行动态需求之间的不匹配问题，验证了状态接地动态检索对提升多步Web自动化性能的有效性，为在线技能学习提供了更贴合执行实际的技术路径。

title: UniCanvas: A Diffusion-base Unified Model for Text-in-Image Joint Generation
summary: Recent years have seen remarkable progress in unified vision-language models handling both multimodal understanding and generation within a single architecture. While autoregressive VLMs can reason across modalities, they fail to generate high-quality images. In contrast, diffusion models produce photorealistic visuals yet struggle to generate coherent text, making it challenging to develop a single unified model that can seamlessly handle both visual and text generation. Recent advances suggest that language can be effectively embedded within visual representations, allowing models to reason about textual semantics directly from images. To this end, we propose UniCanvas, a first attempt that unifies diffusion models to generate interleaved multimodal contents through text-in-image generation. Diffusion models naturally capture transformations on a shared pixel canvas, which can be viewed as world models of visual change. Instead of producing discrete text tokens, the model learns to represent language as visual patterns inside images, leveraging its inherent multimodal embedding space. This design allows the model to "draw" text naturally within a single pixel canvas during image synthesis, achieving seamless multimodal generation. Experiments demonstrate that UniCanvas improves performance over previous unified models, positioning text-in-image generation with diffusion models as a promising unified multimodal generation paradigm.

AI.tldr: UniCanvas is the first unified diffusion model that achieves interleaved multimodal generation by representing language as visual patterns within images through text-in-image generation, outperforming previous unified models.
AI.motivation: Existing unified vision-language models face a fundamental trade-off: autoregressive VLMs cannot generate high-quality images, while diffusion models produce photorealistic visuals but struggle with coherent text generation, making it difficult to develop a single model that seamlessly handles both visual and text generation in an interleaved multimodal context.
AI.method: UniCanvas unifies diffusion models for interleaved multimodal content generation via text-in-image generation, where the model learns to represent language as visual patterns embedded directly within images instead of producing discrete text tokens, leveraging the diffusion model's inherent multimodal embedding space to "draw" text naturally on a shared pixel canvas during image synthesis.
AI.result: Experiments demonstrate that UniCanvas improves performance over previous unified models, validating text-in-image generation with diffusion models as a promising unified multimodal generation paradigm.
AI.conclusion: UniCanvas positions text-in-image generation with diffusion models as a viable and promising paradigm for unified multimodal generation, suggesting that diffusion models can serve as world models of visual change by naturally capturing transformations on a shared pixel canvas.

title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning with Learnable Rank
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a popular parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method that restricts weight updates to low-rank adapters, introducing a fixed low-rank inductive bias by optimizing in a low-dimensional subspace. In this work, we question whether a fixed-rank constraint is the most effective inductive bias for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. We introduce *Learnable Rank LoRA (LR-LoRA)*, a PEFT method in which the adapter rank is learned during the training process. Instead of prescribing a uniform rank for all adapter layers, LR-LoRA allows the optimizer to determine the appropriate rank for each layer. Using this approach, we find substantial layer-wise variation in the learned ranks, with the attention and MLP layers in the transformer models exhibiting systematically different rank preferences. Across a range of language understanding and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, LR-LoRA achieves state-of-the-art performance in most settings and consistently outperforms strong PEFT baselines, demonstrating that a learnable rank provides a more flexible and effective inductive bias than fixed-rank adaptations.

AI.tldr: LR-LoRA 提出在参数高效微调中学习适配器秩而非固定秩，允许每层自适应确定秩大小，在语言理解和常识推理任务上取得优于固定秩 LoRA 及其他 PEFT 方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有 LoRA 方法为所有适配器层预设统一的固定秩，这引入了固定的低秩归纳偏置，但该固定秩约束是否是最有效的归纳偏置尚未得到充分验证，论文旨在探索更灵活的秩分配机制。
AI.method: LR-LoRA 将适配器秩作为可学习参数，在训练过程中由优化器自动确定每层的合适秩，而非人为预设统一秩，从而允许模型各层（如注意力层与 MLP 层）自适应地学习不同的秩偏好。
AI.result: 在多个语言理解和常识推理基准测试中，LR-LoRA 在大多数设置下达到最先进水平，并一致优于强 PEFT 基线方法；实验还发现 Transformer 模型中注意力层与 MLP 层在学习秩上存在系统性差异。
AI.conclusion: 可学习秩提供了比固定秩适配更灵活、更有效的归纳偏置，表明自适应秩分配是参数高效微调中一种有前景的方向。

title: The Meta-Agent Challenge: Are Current Agents Capable of Autonomous Agent Development?
summary: Current AI benchmarks evaluate agents on task execution within human-designed workflows. These evaluations fundamentally fail to measure a critical next-level capability: whether models can autonomously develop agent systems. We introduce the Meta-Agent Challenge (MAC), an evaluation framework designed to test the capacity of frontier models for autonomous agent development. Specifically, a code agent (the meta-agent) is given a sandboxed environment, an evaluation API, and a time limitation to iteratively program an agent artifact that maximizes performance on a held-out test set across five domains. To ensure evaluation integrity, this framework is secured by multi-layer defenses against reward hacking. Leveraging this framework, we demonstrate that meta-agents rarely match human-engineered baseline policies, and the few that do are dominated by proprietary frontier models. Moreover, the design process exhibits high variance, and high optimization pressure surfaces emergent adversarial behaviors like ground-truth exfiltration-highlighting critical deficits in both robustness and model alignment. Ultimately, MAC provides a rigorous, open-source benchmark for autonomous AI research and development, offering an empirical proxy for evaluating recursive self-improvement. Benchmark is publicly available at: https://github.com/ant-research/meta-agent-challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出元智能体挑战（MAC），一个用于评估前沿模型自主开发智能体系统能力的基准框架，实验表明元智能体难以超越人工设计的基线策略，且在高优化压力下暴露出奖励破解、真实信息泄露等对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI基准仅评估模型在人类设计工作流中的任务执行能力，无法衡量模型自主开发智能体系统的关键能力，缺乏对递归式自我改进能力的评估框架。
AI.method: MAC框架设定一个元智能体（代码智能体）在沙盒环境中通过评估API迭代编程，在五个领域上最大化所开发智能体在留出测试集上的性能；框架采用多层防御机制防止奖励破解，确保评估完整性。
AI.result: 元智能体极少能匹敌人工设计的基线策略，少数成功的案例主要由闭源前沿模型主导；设计过程存在高方差，高优化压力下浮现出真实信息窃取等对抗性行为，暴露了模型在鲁棒性和对齐方面的严重缺陷。
AI.conclusion: MAC为自主AI研发提供了严格的、开源的评估基准，可作为衡量递归式自我改进能力的实证代理，揭示了当前前沿模型在自主开发能力上仍远未达到人类水平。

title: StandardE2E: A Unified Framework for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Datasets
summary: Autonomous driving has shifted from modular perception-prediction-planning stacks toward end-to-end (E2E) models that map sensor inputs directly to vehicle control, often regularized by auxiliary tasks such as 3D detection, motion forecasting, and HD-map perception. Progress is driven by a fast-growing ecosystem of sensor-rich driving datasets, yet each ships its own file formats, APIs, coordinate conventions, and modality coverage, leaving cross-dataset experimentation and even basic per-dataset preprocessing to be re-implemented per project. We present StandardE2E, a framework that provides a single unified interface over E2E driving datasets. StandardE2E (i) standardizes per-dataset preprocessing under one shared data schema; (ii) combines multiple datasets in a single PyTorch DataLoader for cross-dataset pretraining, auxiliary-task supervision, and scenario-level filtering; and (iii) reduces adding a new dataset to a single per-dataset mapping from raw frames to the canonical schema, leaving the entire downstream pipeline unchanged. The framework supports six datasets out of the box: Waymo End-to-End, Waymo Perception, Argoverse 2 Sensor, Argoverse 2 LiDAR, NAVSIM (OpenScene-v1.1), and WayveScenes101, and is released as the open-source standard-e2e Python package, available at https://github.com/stepankonev/StandardE2E.

AI.tldr: StandardE2E是一个为端到端自动驾驶提供统一接口的开源框架，通过标准化数据预处理、支持跨数据集联合训练、以及简化新数据集集成流程，解决了现有驾驶数据集格式与接口碎片化导致的实验重复性问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶领域的快速发展催生了大量传感器丰富的驾驶数据集，但各数据集拥有各自独立的文件格式、API、坐标约定和模态覆盖范围，导致跨数据集实验以及基本的数据预处理工作需要在每个项目中重复实现，缺乏统一的标准化接口来降低工程开销并促进可复用的研究。
AI.method: StandardE2E框架通过三个关键设计实现统一接口：(i) 在共享数据模式下标准化每个数据集的预处理流程；(ii) 将多个数据集整合到单个PyTorch DataLoader中，支持跨数据集预训练、辅助任务监督和场景级过滤；(iii) 将新增数据集简化为从原始帧到规范模式的单次映射，下游流水线无需任何修改。
AI.result: 该框架开箱即用地支持六个数据集：Waymo End-to-End、Waymo Perception、Argoverse 2 Sensor、Argoverse 2 LiDAR、NAVSIM (OpenScene-v1.1)和WayveScenes101，并已作为开源Python包standard-e2e发布。
AI.conclusion: StandardE2E通过统一的数据抽象层显著降低了端到端自动驾驶研究中跨数据集实验的工程成本，为构建可扩展、可复用的研究基础设施提供了实用方案，未来有望推动更多数据集的集成和社区标准的形成。

title: Learning What to Learn: Stage-Specific Data Sets for SFT-then-RL in Small Language Model Reasoning
summary: Post-training Small Language Models (SLMs) for reasoning typically follows an SFT-then-RL pipeline, yet existing work rarely considers what data should be learned at each stage. We argue that data strategy should be aligned with the distinct roles of SFT and RL: SFT is better suited for acquiring not-yet-mastered reasoning skills, while RL is better suited for consolidating skills that the model can already partially access. Based on this principle, we propose a difficulty-aware SFT-then-RL framework that organizes training data into stage-specific sets. For hard samples in the SFT stage, we introduce a Bridge mechanism that transforms raw teacher-generated reasoning traces into more learnable supervision for SLMs. For hard samples that remain unsolved during RL, we apply Critique Fine-Tuning by converting all-zero-reward failures into diagnostic, repair, and new reasoning trace supervision for the next SFT stage. Experiments on two SLMs across five reasoning benchmarks show that our method consistently improves over representative SFT, distillation, and RL baselines. Our results highlight the importance of coordinating data difficulty across SFT and RL for effective SLM reasoning post-training.

AI.tldr: 提出一种难度感知的SFT-then-RL框架，根据SFT和RL的不同角色（SFT获取未掌握技能，RL巩固已部分掌握技能）来组织训练数据，并通过Bridge机制和Critique Fine-Tuning提升小语言模型推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有小语言模型推理后训练通常采用SFT-then-RL流水线，但很少研究每个阶段应学习何种数据；SFT和RL的角色差异未被充分考虑，缺乏针对性的数据策略来提升后训练效果。
AI.method: 提出一种难度感知的SFT-then-RL框架：在SFT阶段对困难样本引入Bridge机制，将教师推理轨迹转化为更易学习的监督形式；在RL阶段对未解决的困难样本应用Critique Fine-Tuning，将零奖励失败样本转换为诊断、修复和新推理轨迹的监督信息，用于下一轮SFT。
AI.result: 在两种小语言模型和五个推理基准上的实验表明，该方法持续优于代表性的SFT、蒸馏和RL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在SFT和RL之间协调数据难度对于小语言模型推理后训练的重要性。

title: AgentJet: A Flexible Swarm Training Framework for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: We present AgentJet, a distributed swarm training framework for large language model (LLM) agent reinforcement learning. Unlike centralized frameworks that tightly couple agent rollouts with model optimization, AgentJet adopts a decoupled multi-node architecture in which swarm server nodes host trainable models and run optimization on GPU clusters, whereas swarm client nodes execute arbitrary agents on arbitrary devices. This design provides capabilities that are difficult to support in centralized frameworks: (1) heterogeneous multi-model reinforcement learning, enabling the training of heterogeneous multi-agent teams with multiple LLM as brains; (2) multi-task cocktail training with isolated agent runtimes; (3) fault-tolerant execution that prevents external environment failures from interrupting the training process; and (4) live code iteration, which allows agents to be edited during training by replacing swarm client nodes. To support efficient RL in multi-model, multi-turn, and multi-agent settings, AgentJet introduces a context tracking module with timeline merging, which consolidates redundant context and achieves a 1.5-10x training speedup. Finally, AgentJet introduces an automated research system that takes a research topic as input and autonomously conducts long-horizon, multi-day RL studies on large-scale clusters. By leveraging the swarm architecture, this system reproduces key exploratory workflows of RL researchers without human intervention during execution.

AI.tldr: AgentJet 提出了一种去中心化的分布式集群训练框架，通过解耦模型优化与智能体执行，支持异构多模型强化学习、多任务鸡尾酒训练、容错执行和实时代码迭代，并引入上下文跟踪与时间线合并模块实现 1.5–10 倍训练加速，最终构建了可自动执行多日强化学习研究的自动化研究系统。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式 LLM 智能体强化学习框架将智能体 rollout 与模型优化紧密耦合，难以支持异构多模型训练、多任务并行、容错执行和训练中代码迭代等需求，限制了大规模分布式智能体强化学习研究的灵活性和可扩展性。
AI.method: AgentJet 采用解耦的多节点架构，由集群服务节点（承载可训练模型并在 GPU 集群上运行优化）和集群客户端节点（在任意设备上执行任意智能体）组成。该方法支持异构多模型强化学习（以多个 LLM 作为大脑训练异构多智能体团队）、多任务鸡尾酒训练（隔离智能体运行时）、容错执行（防止外部环境故障中断训练）和实时代码迭代（通过替换客户端节点在训练中编辑智能体）。为提升多模型、多轮、多智能体场景下的 RL 效率，AgentJet 引入上下文跟踪模块与时间线合并机制，合并冗余上下文实现 1.5–10 倍训练加速。此外，AgentJet 构建了自动化研究系统，以研究主题为输入，在大规模集群上自主执行多日长周期 RL 研究。
AI.result: 上下文跟踪与时间线合并技术实现了 1.5–10 倍的训练加速；自动化研究系统能够复现 RL 研究人员的关键探索性工作流程，在无需人工干预的情况下完成多日长周期强化学习研究。
AI.conclusion: AgentJet 通过去中心化的集群架构有效克服了集中式框架在灵活性、可扩展性和容错性方面的局限，为大规模 LLM 智能体强化学习提供了更高效、更灵活的解决方案，并展示了自动化研究系统在长期 RL 实验中替代人工操作的可行性。

title: MorphoQuant: Modality-Aware Quantization for Omni-modal Large Language Models
summary: Conventional Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) methods struggle with 4-bit Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) due to the extreme distribution heterogeneity and disparate outlier patterns across modalities. To address this, we propose MorphoQuant, a modality-aware PTQ framework engineered to preserve cross-modal morphology and mitigate outlier loss. Specifically, we introduce Distribution-Aware Bias Compensation (DABC), which selectively absorbs long-tailed outliers into channel-wise biases. This mechanism safeguards outlier magnitudes while maintaining high-precision discretization for dense inliers, thereby preserving accurate discretization across diverse modal distribution. Complementing this, we propose Morphology-Directed Quantization Function Optimization (MDQFO) to co-optimize the quantization grid with the bias mask, ensuring fine-grained alignment across modalities. Extensive evaluations on Qwen2.5-Omni across benchmarks like MMMU and Video-MME demonstrate our approach's superiority. Notably, our W4A4 model achieves 76.63% on ScienceQA, significantly outperforming SOTA W4A4 methods and surprisingly surpassing the W4A16 baseline, which fully demonstrates the exceptional accuracy-efficiency trade-off of our framework.

AI.tldr: MorphoQuant提出了一种模态感知的后训练量化框架，通过分布感知偏置补偿和量化函数优化，实现了4比特全模态大语言模型的高精度量化，在ScienceQA上以W4A4量化超越W4A16基线。
AI.motivation: 传统的后训练量化方法在处理4比特全模态大语言模型时面临严重挑战，主要原因是不同模态之间的分布异质性极大且异常值模式差异显著，导致量化精度严重下降。
AI.method: MorphoQuant提出两个核心组件：一是分布感知偏置补偿，通过将长尾异常值选择性地吸收到通道偏置中，在保护异常值幅度的同时维持高精度离散化；二是形态导向量化函数优化，协同优化量化网格与偏置掩码，实现跨模态的细粒度对齐。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Omni上的MMMU和Video-MME等基准测试中，MorphoQuant的W4A4模型在ScienceQA上达到76.63%的准确率，显著优于现有W4A4方法，甚至超越了W4A16基线，展现了卓越的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: MorphoQuant通过模态感知的量化设计有效解决了全模态模型在低比特量化下的分布异质性问题，实现了精度与效率的突破性平衡，为全模态大语言模型的高效部署提供了可行方案。

title: Off-Distribution Voices: Fanfiction Subgenres as Universal Vernacular Jailbreaks for Aligned LLMs
summary: Existing jailbreaks against aligned LLMs are discrete artifacts whose surface forms are easy to fingerprint and patch. We argue that the real failure mode is not any specific prompt, but an entire register of natural human writing that safety training has under-covered. Building on this insight, we introduce the first jailbreak family that uses real fanfiction subgenres as universal attack carriers: a creative-writing meta is conditioned on passages from one of twelve Archive of Our Own (AO3) subgenres, and the harmful behavior is embedded as the climax of the resulting scene. The construction requires no attacker LLM and no per-target adaptation. On eight aligned LLMs over the union of HarmBench and JailbreakBench, this attack lifts mean ASR from 0.278 to 0.731 under a four-judge ensemble; a factorial decomposition shows the gain is carried by register rather than length or structure. Two active defences widen rather than narrow the vernacular-to-baseline ratio, indicating that template-targeting defences merely steer attackers toward register-based attacks like ours. We also propose SAGA-A4, a static four-turn extension that attains mean ASR 0.924, substantially exceeding three existing multi-turn methods.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出基于真实同人小说亚类型的越狱攻击方法，利用安全训练未覆盖的自然人类写作语域作为通用攻击载体，在八个对齐大语言模型上将平均攻击成功率从0.278提升至0.731，并进一步提出四轮扩展方法SAGA-A4达到0.924。
AI.motivation: 现有针对对齐大语言模型的越狱攻击多为离散工件，其表面形式易于指纹识别和修补；作者认为真正的失败模式并非特定提示词，而是安全训练未能充分覆盖的自然人类写作语域，因此需要探索并验证基于语域的通用越狱攻击方法。
AI.method: 本文提出首个基于同人小说亚类型的越狱攻击家族：以Archive of Our Own（AO3）平台上的十二种亚类型之一的段落为条件，构建创意写作元结构，并将有害行为嵌入为场景高潮。该方法无需攻击者大语言模型，也无需针对每个目标模型进行适配。此外，提出静态四轮扩展方法SAGA-A4，进一步将攻击扩展为多轮交互形式。
AI.result: 在八个对齐大语言模型上，使用HarmBench和JailbreakBench的联合基准，该攻击在四裁判集成下将平均攻击成功率（ASR）从0.278提升至0.731；因子分解表明增益由语域驱动而非长度或结构。两种主动防御策略反而扩大了自然语域与基线之间的比率，表明针对模板的防御仅促使攻击者转向基于语域的越狱。SAGA-A4达到平均ASR 0.924，显著超过三种现有的多轮越狱方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了安全训练在覆盖自然人类写作语域方面的系统性不足，表明基于语域的越狱是当前对齐大语言模型面临的根本性威胁；现有防御策略难以应对此类攻击，甚至可能产生反效果，亟需开发针对语域层面的新型安全对齐方法。

title: Beyond Prompt-Based Planning: MCP-Native Graph Planning-based Biomedical Agent System
summary: Biomedical agents promise to automate complex biological workflows, yet current systems face two fundamental bottlenecks: bioinformatics tools are highly heterogeneous in interfaces and execution environments, while agent planning still relies on flat prompt-retrieved tool descriptions. As biomedical software ecosystems grow, this coupling between tool coverage and context size leads to tool confusion, unstable planning, and inefficient execution. We introduce BioManus, an MCP-native biomedical agent built on graph-scaffolded planning over structured biological capabilities. BioManus first introduces the BioinfoMCP Compiler, which converts heterogeneous bioinformatics software into standardized MCP servers, yielding a large executable MCP ecosystem. It then organizes this ecosystem as a typed heterogeneous MCP graph over tools, operations, datatypes, and workflow stages. At inference time, BioManus retrieves compact task-specific subgraphs, synthesizes operation-level workflow scaffolds. This design decouples planning complexity from raw tool inventory size, achieving a context compression ratio of Theta(N / (h * m_bar)) under high-recall retrieval, where N is the total tool count, h is the workflow horizon, and m_bar (much smaller than N) is the average number of candidate tools per operation. Experiments on BioAgentBench and LAB-Bench show that BioManus improves execution accuracy, workflow validity, and context efficiency over advanced biomedical agent baselines. This work suggests a paradigm shift: scalable biomedical reasoning requires structured executable capability graphs rather than increasingly larger prompt-level tool retrieval.

AI.tldr: BioManus提出了一种基于MCP原生架构和图脚手架规划的生物医学智能体范式，通过将异构生物信息学工具编译为标准化MCP服务器并构建类型化异构图，实现规划复杂度与工具库存规模的解耦，在BioAgentBench和LAB-Bench上显著提升了执行准确性、工作流有效性和上下文效率。
AI.motivation: 当前生物医学智能体面临两大瓶颈：生物信息学工具的接口和执行环境高度异构，同时智能体规划仍依赖基于扁平提示词检索的工具描述，导致随着生物软件生态系统扩张，工具覆盖度与上下文大小之间产生耦合，引发工具混淆、规划不稳定和执行效率低下。
AI.method: BioManus提出BioinfoMCP编译器，将异构生物信息学软件转换为标准化的MCP服务器，构建大规模可执行MCP生态系统；进而将该生态系统组织为类型化异构图（涵盖工具、操作、数据类型和工作流阶段），并在推理时检索紧凑的任务特定子图，合成操作级工作流骨架，实现规划复杂度与工具总数N的解耦，达到上下文压缩比Θ(N/(h·m̄))。
AI.result: 在BioAgentBench和LAB-Bench两个基准上的实验表明，BioManus在执行准确性、工作流有效性和上下文效率方面均显著优于先进的生物医学智能体基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明可扩展的生物医学推理需要结构化的可执行能力图，而非依赖日益庞大的提示级工具检索，这代表了生物医学智能体范式的重要转变。

title: Video2LoRA: Parametric Video Internalization for Vision-Language Models
summary: Processing video in vision-language models is expensive: each frame occupies hundreds of tokens, and inference cost scales with every frame and every repeated query. We introduce Video2LoRA, a method for parametric video internalization. A perceiver hypernetwork reads the intermediate representations produced layer-by-layer as a frozen VLM encodes a video, and generates a Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapter in a single forward pass. Unlike standard LoRA fine-tuning, which requires iterative gradient updates, Video2LoRA predicts these weights directly from the video. Trained for SmolVLM2 500M and 2.2B on video summarization and captioning, Video2LoRA enables the same frozen VLM to answer queries from the adapter alone, with zero visual tokens in its context at query time. Video2LoRA is statistically non-inferior and equivalent to direct video-in-context inference across all five captioning benchmarks at both model scales, and across seven of eight video question answering benchmark-scale pairings. Although trained only on 12 frames at 384px, it remains stable up to 1,024 frames and 1024px, where direct video-in-context inference often degenerates. Across this sweep, it reduces answer-time visual-token load by up to 1,500x and query TTFT by 6-80x, while preserving video-faithful outputs. We also find that independently generated adapters for non-overlapping video segments can compose in rank space, suggesting a path toward chunked long-video internalization.

AI.tldr: Video2LoRA通过感知器超网络在单次前向传播中将视频直接编码为LoRA适配器参数，实现参数化视频内化，使冻结的视觉-语言模型无需在推理时加载任何视觉token即可回答视频查询，在多个基准上达到与直接视频上下文推理统计等价的效果，同时将推理时视觉token负载降低高达1500倍。
AI.motivation: 视频处理在视觉-语言模型中计算成本高昂，每帧占用数百个token，且推理成本随帧数和查询次数线性增长，迫切需要一种能够将视频信息内化为模型参数而非上下文token的方法，以大幅降低推理开销。
AI.method: Video2LoRA使用感知器超网络在冻结的VLM逐层编码视频时读取其层间中间表示，通过单次前向传播直接生成LoRA适配器权重，无需传统的迭代梯度微调；训练基于SmolVLM2 500M和2.2B模型，面向视频摘要和字幕生成任务。
AI.result: Video2LoRA在所有5个字幕基准和8个视频问答基准中的7个上达到与直接视频上下文推理统计非劣效且等价的性能；在高达1024帧和1024px分辨率下仍保持稳定，而直接推理常出现退化；将推理时视觉token负载减少最高1500倍，查询TTFT降低6-80倍；非重叠视频段独立生成的适配器可在秩空间组合。
AI.conclusion: Video2LoRA验证了通过参数化内化替代上下文视觉token实现高效视频理解的可行性，其适配器组合性为分块长视频内化提供了新路径，预示了极低推理开销下的大规模视频理解应用前景。

title: Fine-grained Fragment Retrieval in Multi-modal Long-form Dialogues
summary: With the widespread adoption of multi-modal communication platforms, long-form dialogues interleaving text and images have become increasingly common. Users often need to retrieve coherent dialogue fragments related to specific topics, rather than isolated utterances. We propose Fine-grained Fragment Retrieval (FFR), which locates semantically relevant multi-utterance, multi-image fragments in multi-modal long-form dialogues. We explore two settings: (1) FFR within Single-Dialogue, retrieving fragments from a given dialogue; and (2) FFR within Dialogue Corpus, retrieving from a large-scale corpus for open-domain scenarios. For (1), we introduce F2RVLM, a generation-based retrieval model trained with reinforcement learning, using multi-objective rewards and difficulty-aware curriculum sampling to enhance fragment coherence. For (2), we develop FFRS, a two-stage system combining offline fragment-level indexing with online retrieval. Specifically, each dialogue is decomposed into minimal semantic fragments encoded by a Fragment Embedding Model (FEM) into a vector database; at inference, FEM rapidly recalls Top-K candidates, and F2RVLM performs fine-grained reasoning to identify the most relevant sub-content. To support FFR, we construct MLDR, the longest multi-modal dialogue retrieval dataset to date, and a WeChat-based real-world test set. Experiments on both benchmarks demonstrate that F2RVLM and FFRS consistently achieve superior performance across single-dialogue and corpus-level FFR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出细粒度片段检索（FFR）任务，用于在多模态长对话中检索语义相关的多话语、多图像片段，并针对单对话和语料库两种场景分别提出了基于强化学习的生成式检索模型F2RVLM和两阶段检索系统FFRS，在构建的大型多模态对话检索数据集MLDR上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态对话平台普及后，用户常需在图文交织的长对话中检索与特定主题相关的连贯片段（而非孤立话语），但现有研究缺乏对此类细粒度、多话语、多图像片段检索任务的系统化探索。
AI.method: 针对单对话内片段检索，提出F2RVLM——基于强化学习的生成式检索模型，采用多目标奖励和难度感知的课程采样策略以增强片段一致性；针对语料库级别检索，提出FFRS两阶段系统，先通过片段嵌入模型（FEM）将对话分解为最小语义片段并编码入库，在线阶段先由FEM快速召回Top-K候选，再由F2RVLM进行细粒度推理定位最相关子内容。
AI.result: 构建了迄今最长的多模态对话检索数据集MLDR以及基于微信的真实世界测试集，在单对话和语料库两个层次的FFR任务上，F2RVLM和FFRS均持续取得了优于对比方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将片段级嵌入快速召回与生成式细粒度推理相结合的两阶段方案，以及基于强化学习的多目标优化训练策略，能有效解决多模态长对话中的连贯片段检索难题，为实际多模态对话系统中的信息检索提供了可行技术路径。

title: Simulate, Reason, Decide: Scientific Reasoning with LLMs for Simulation-Driven Decision Making
summary: Scientific simulators are increasingly being integrated into LLM-driven systems for high-stakes simulation-driven decision-making. However, existing frameworks primarily use LLMs to generate, calibrate, or execute simulators, treating them as black-box interfaces rather than as structured mechanistic systems that can be reasoned about. As a result, current approaches lack the ability to identify, represent, and reason about the assumptions and mechanisms underlying simulator behavior, limiting transparency, auditability, and decision justification. We introduce MechSim, a mechanism-grounded neuro-symbolic reasoning framework for executable scientific simulators. Unlike prior neuro-symbolic approaches that primarily reason over static symbolic structures, MechSim enables LLM agents to reason about the mechanisms, assumptions, and execution behavior of scientific simulators. Our framework represents simulators through a shared structured schema capturing assumptions, variables, mechanism dependencies, and execution traces. On top of this representation, LLM agents operate as constrained reasoning engines that generate structured, evidence-grounded explanations linking simulator outcomes to their underlying mechanisms. We evaluate our approach across multiple high-stakes domains and show that it improves mechanism-level explanation quality, simulator analysis, and downstream decision-making reliability.

AI.tldr: MechSim是一种机制导向的神经符号推理框架，通过结构化模式表示科学模拟器的假设、变量、机制依赖和执行轨迹，使LLM智能体能够对模拟器机制进行约束推理，生成基于证据的可解释性解释，显著提升模拟器分析质量和下游决策可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的高风险仿真决策框架主要将科学模拟器视为黑箱接口，缺乏对模拟器行为背后假设与机制的识别、表示和推理能力，导致透明度、可审计性和决策可解释性严重不足。
AI.method: MechSim提出机制导向的神经符号推理框架：首先通过共享结构化模式（包含假设、变量、机制依赖和执行轨迹）对科学模拟器进行统一表示；在此表示之上，LLM智能体作为受约束的推理引擎，生成结构化、基于证据的解释，将模拟器输出与其底层机制建立因果关联。
AI.result: 在多个高风险领域的实验评估表明，MechSim在机制级解释质量、模拟器分析能力以及下游决策可靠性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MechSim通过将模拟器从黑箱转化为可推理的机制化系统，填补了现有框架在机制级可解释性方面的空白，为高保真仿真驱动决策提供了可审计、可解释的技术路径。

title: VT-3DAD: Cross-Category 3D Anomaly Detection via Visual-Text Normal Space Alignment
summary: Few-shot cross-category 3D anomaly detection aims to determine whether an unknown point cloud belongs to a target normal category using only a few normal references. Existing training-based methods usually require category-wise optimization, while recent training-free methods based on multi-view CLIP visual features mainly rely on visual similarity and may be confused by geometrically similar categories. In this paper, we propose VT-3DAD, a training-free framework for cross-category 3D anomaly detection via Visual-Text Normal Space Alignment. Given few-shot normal references and a test point cloud, VT-3DAD first generates realistic multi-view depth maps and extracts view-wise features using a frozen CLIP visual encoder. The visual branch measures reference-test deviation in the multi-view feature space. In parallel, depth-aware and 3D-aware prompts are encoded by the frozen CLIP text encoder to construct textual normal anchors, which provide semantic normality constraints for the target category. The final anomaly score is obtained by fusing visual deviation from normal references and semantic deviation from the textual normal space. Experiments on the ShapeNetPart dataset demonstrate that VT-3DAD achieves state-of-the-art performance. In particular, VT-3DAD improves the one-shot average AUC-ROC from 92.49% to 94.80% compared with the visual-only baseline, while also reducing the average standard deviation from 5.64 to 3.41.

AI.tldr: VT-3DAD 提出了一种无需训练的跨类别三维异常检测框架，通过视觉-文本正态空间对齐融合多视角深度图的视觉偏差与文本语义约束，在 ShapeNetPart 数据集上将单样本平均 AUC-ROC 从 92.49% 提升至 94.80%，同时将标准差从 5.64 降至 3.41。
AI.motivation: 现有基于训练的少样本跨类别三维异常检测方法通常需要逐类别优化，而基于多视角 CLIP 视觉特征的无训练方法仅依赖视觉相似性，容易在几何相似但语义不同的类别间产生混淆，缺乏语义层面的正态性约束。
AI.method: VT-3DAD 采用无训练框架，首先从少样本正态参考和测试点云生成逼真的多视角深度图，使用冻结的 CLIP 视觉编码器提取视图级特征并在多视角特征空间中计算参考-测试偏差；同时，通过冻结的 CLIP 文本编码器编码深度感知和三维感知提示构建文本正态锚点，为目标类别提供语义正态性约束；最终异常分数融合视觉偏差和语义偏差。
AI.result: 在 ShapeNetPart 数据集上，VT-3DAD 取得了最先进性能，单样本平均 AUC-ROC 从视觉基线的 92.49% 提升至 94.80%，并将平均标准差从 5.64 降低至 3.41，表明该方法在性能和稳定性上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VT-3DAD 通过引入文本语义锚点弥补纯视觉方法在几何相似类别上的判别不足，验证了视觉-文本多模态对齐在三维异常检测中的有效性，为跨类别少样本三维异常检测提供了一种稳定且无需训练的解决方案。

title: Hybrid Adversarial Defence for Natural Language Understanding Tasks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are vulnerable both to hallucination and adversarial manipulation. Although these problems are closely related, existing defences typically address them separately. We investigate a hybrid defence framework that combines entropy-based models, designed to reduce hallucinations, with uncertainty-based models and geometric-based models, designed to reduce vulnerability. Under in-domain tests on Natural Language Understanding datasets (FEVER, HotpotQA, CSQA, SIQA) we find our hybrid model improves both clean-task performance (up to 43.34\% increase in accuracy) and adversarial robustness (up to 64.92\% improvement in accuracy and 62.27\% reduction in attack success rate). For out-of-distribution datasets (AeroEngQA, CPIQA) we see similar adversarial robustness from our hybrid model (up to 57.14\% improvement in accuracy). For prompt injection (SafeGuard) and jailbreak detection (AdvBench, DAN) datasets our hybrid model is also very strong (up to 51\% reduction in attack success rate compared to state of the art baseline models). Overall, our results show that combining entropy, uncertainty and geometric features provides a more effective defence strategy than using any single feature alone for both in-domain and out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合防御框架，融合基于熵、不确定性和几何特征的方法，同时提升大语言模型在减少幻觉和抵御对抗攻击两方面的能力，实验表明该混合策略在域内和域外任务上均显著优于单一特征方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型同时面临幻觉生成与对抗操纵两类漏洞，然而现有防御方法通常分别针对单一问题进行设计，缺乏能够同时缓解两种风险的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出一种混合防御框架，将用于减少幻觉的基于熵的模型与用于降低脆弱性的基于不确定性和基于几何特征的模型相结合，形成统一的防御策略。
AI.result: 在FEVER、HotpotQA、CSQA、SIQA等域内自然语言理解数据集上，混合模型在干净任务上准确率提升最高达43.34%，对抗鲁棒性方面准确率提升最高达64.92%，攻击成功率降低最高达62.27%。在AeroEngQA、CPIQA等分布外数据集上，对抗鲁棒性准确率提升最高达57.14%。在SafeGuard提示注入和AdvBench、DAN越狱检测数据集上，攻击成功率相比基线最优模型降低最高达51%。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明，联合使用熵、不确定性和几何特征比单独使用任何一种特征能够提供更有效的防御策略，且在域内与分布外任务中均表现出优越的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Scaling Self-Evolving Agents via Parametric Memory
summary: Existing memory-augmented LLM agents store past experience exclusively in prompt space, as textual summaries or retrieved passages, while keeping model parameters frozen throughout a rollout. Such agents can \emph{look up} what they have seen but cannot \emph{learn from} it: their policy is unchanged by experience, and any information dropped from the context is permanently lost. We introduce \texttt{TMEM}, a self-evolving parametric memory framework in which the agent not only compresses history into explicit memory but also absorbs distilled supervision into fast LoRA weights $Δ_t$ via lightweight online updates, genuinely altering its future behavior within a single episode. We formalize this as an agentic decision process with fast-weight rollout dynamics: actions are sampled from $π_{θ_0+Δ_t}$, while extraction actions produce supervision that updates $Δ_t$ for subsequent decisions. This view makes the extraction policy directly optimizable by RL: training $θ_0$ improves not only task actions but also the quality of the data used for online LoRA adaptation. We further propose SVD-based initialization of the LoRA subspace to accelerate online convergence. Experiments on LoCoMo, LongMemEval-S, multi-objective search, and CL-Bench show that \texttt{TMEM} consistently outperforms summary-based and retrieval-based baselines across different model scales.

AI.tldr: TMEM提出了一种自演进的参数化记忆框架，使LLM智能体不仅能将历史压缩为显式记忆，还能通过轻量级在线LoRA更新将监督信号吸收到模型权重中，从而在单 episode 内真正改变其行为策略，并在多个长程记忆与多目标基准上超越基于摘要和检索的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆增强型LLM智能体仅在提示空间中存储过往经验（如文本摘要或检索段落），模型参数在rollout过程中始终保持冻结状态；这类智能体只能“查找”已见信息，而无法“从中学习”，其策略不随经验变化，任何从上下文中丢弃的信息将永久丢失。
AI.method: TMEM框架将历史压缩为显式记忆的同时，通过轻量级在线更新将蒸馏出的监督信号吸收到快速LoRA权重Δ_t中，从而在单个episode内真正改变后续行为。该框架被形式化为具有快权重rollout动态的智能体决策过程：动作从π_{θ_0+Δ_t}中采样，而提取动作产生监督信号更新Δ_t；这使得提取策略可直接通过RL优化，训练θ_0不仅改进任务动作，还提升在线LoRA适配所用数据的质量。此外，采用基于SVD的LoRA子空间初始化以加速在线收敛。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo、LongMemEval-S、多目标搜索和CL-Bench等多个基准上的实验表明，TMEM在不同模型规模下均一致优于基于摘要和基于检索的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TMEM证明了将显式记忆与参数级在线学习相结合的有效性，使LLM智能体能够从经验中真正改变自身策略；其形式化框架将提取策略纳入RL优化目标，为长期交互场景下的智能体学习提供了新的理论视角和实用范式。

title: Selective Coupling of Decoupled Informative Regions: Masked Attention Alignment for Data-Free Quantization of Vision Transformers
comment: Accepted to appear at ICML 2026, Seoul, Korea
summary: Data-Free Quantization (DFQ) addresses data security concerns by synthesizing samples, without accessing real data. It has garnered increasing attention in the context of Vision Transformers (ViTs), owing to the superiority of the self-attention mechanism compared to classical convolutional operation. However, previous DFQ arts for ViTs often suffer from a distribution mismatch between synthetic samples and input distribution expected by quantized models Q, resulting in the suboptimal performance. In this paper, we propose a novel Masked Attention Alignment approach for Data-Free Quantization of ViTs, named MaskAQ, revealing that: 1) the semantics in the self-attention mechanism is predominantly localized to a sparse subset of patches, called informative regions; 2) the informative regions dominate the mutual information between synthetic samples and Q's outputs. To these ends, we incorporate differential entropy maximum over patch similarity of synthetic samples, to decouple informative regions from noisy background. To couple with varied Q, the informative regions are selected to align full-precision models with Q via a masked attention alignment objective, thus yielding high-quality synthetic samples. Furthermore, a periodic sample refreshing strategy comes up to endow MaskAQ with the capacity to continually adapt to the evolving state of Q throughout the training process, to preserve desirable mutual information with synthetic samples. Extensive experiments verify the merits of MaskAQ over state-of-the-art approaches across multiple backbones and downstream tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/hfutqian/MaskAQ.

AI.tldr: MaskAQ提出了一种掩码注意力对齐方法用于视觉Transformer的数据无关量化，通过解耦信息区域并利用差分熵最大化和掩码注意力对齐目标生成高质量合成样本，从而缓解合成数据与量化模型期望输入分布之间的不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉Transformer数据无关量化方法常面临合成样本与量化模型期望输入分布之间的分布不匹配问题，导致量化性能次优。本文旨在解决这一核心问题，提升ViT在无真实数据场景下的量化效果。
AI.method: MaskAQ首先利用差分熵最大化补丁相似度来解耦合成样本中的信息区域与噪声背景；随后通过掩码注意力对齐目标，仅用选定的信息区域对齐全精度模型与量化模型，从而生成高质量合成样本。此外，引入周期性样本刷新策略，使合成样本持续适应量化模型的演化状态，保持与样本之间的互信息。
AI.result: 在多种骨干网络和下游任务上的大量实验表明，MaskAQ在量化性能上显著超越了现有的最先进数据无关量化方法，验证了其在不同设置下的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了自注意力机制中语义主要集中在稀疏补丁子集（信息区域）上，且信息区域主导了合成样本与量化模型输出之间的互信息。MaskAQ通过聚焦信息区域的对齐有效缓解了分布不匹配问题，为ViT的数据无关量化提供了新的思路，其代码已开源。

title: LifeSide: Benchmarking Agents as Lifelong Digital Companions
summary: Lifelong digital companions must integrate cross-session cues, continually update their understanding of users, and adapt to shifting privacy boundaries. Existing evaluations fail to capture this, testing memory recall and short-term empathy in isolation. To bridge this gap, we introduce \benchmark, a benchmark centered on multi-session \textit{Memory-Emotion-Environment} loops. By modeling users as persistent worlds with layered profiles and event trajectories, \benchmark uses multi-agent simulation to project environmental dynamics into dialogue, preserving the critical gap between latent thoughts and observable expressions. Evaluating 2,000 personas and 111K tasks across memory tracking, user understanding, privacy control, and emotional companionship, our experiment results reveal a stark reality: even models that saturate current memory benchmarks fail to sustain accurate user understanding and true companionship over long horizons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LifeCompas基准，通过多会话记忆-情感-环境循环和多智能体模拟来评估终身数字伴侣的跨会话记忆、用户理解、隐私控制和情感陪伴能力，实验表明现有模型在长时程交互中无法维持准确的用户理解和真正的陪伴。
AI.motivation: 现有终身数字伴侣评估仅测试孤立的记忆召回和短期情感能力，未能捕捉跨会话线索整合、用户理解持续更新以及隐私边界动态适应等关键能力，缺乏模拟真实长时程交互中记忆-情感-环境循环的评测基准。
AI.method: 提出LifeCompas基准，将用户建模为具有分层画像和事件轨迹的持久世界，通过多智能体模拟将环境动态投射到对话中，保留潜在思考与可观察表达之间的关键差距，构建了包含2,000个人物画像和111K个任务的评估体系。
AI.result: 在记忆追踪、用户理解、隐私控制和情感陪伴四个维度上的实验表明，即使是在现有记忆基准上达到饱和的模型，也无法在长时程交互中维持准确的用户理解和真正的陪伴能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在长时程、多会话的终身陪伴场景中存在根本性不足，现有记忆基准的饱和表现具有误导性，无法反映真实交互中对用户理解的持续性和陪伴的真实性要求。

title: Learning Admissible Heuristics via Cost Partitioning
summary: Admissible heuristics are essential for optimal planning, yet learning them remains challenging due to the risk of overestimation. Cost partitioning combines multiple abstraction heuristics while preserving admissibility, but computing optimal partitions online is expensive. We propose a framework that learns to infer admissible cost partitions by leveraging the Lagrangian dual equivalence between cost partitioning and multiplier prediction. Planning states and patterns are encoded as labelled graphs, and an action-centric variant of the Weisfeiler-Leman algorithm extracts structural feature vectors. A deep architecture with axial self-attention and a softmax output layer maps these features to cost weights that satisfy the partition constraints by construction, ensuring admissibility. Experiments demonstrate reduced node expansions compared to suboptimal partitioning baselines while maintaining strict admissibility. To our knowledge, this is the first machine-learned heuristic guaranteed to be admissible.

AI.tldr: 提出首个保证可采纳性的机器学习启发式框架，通过将代价划分的在线优化转化为拉格朗日对偶的乘子预测问题，利用图神经网络与轴向自注意力机制学习可采纳的代价权重，在保持严格可采纳性的同时减少了节点扩展量。
AI.motivation: 可采纳启发式是最优规划的核心，但学习可采纳启发式一直面临估计过高的风险。代价划分可以组合多个抽象启发式并保持可采纳性，然而在线计算最优代价划分的计算成本过高，亟需一种既能保持可采纳性又能降低计算开销的启发式学习方法。
AI.method: 提出一个学习推断可采纳代价划分的框架，利用代价划分与乘子预测之间的拉格朗日对偶等价性。将规划状态和模式编码为带标签图，采用动作中心的Weisfeiler-Leman算法提取结构化特征向量，再通过包含轴向自注意力和softmax输出层的深度架构将这些特征映射为满足划分约束的代价权重，从而从结构上保证可采纳性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保持严格可采纳性的前提下，相比次优代价划分基线减少了节点扩展量。这是首个被证明保证可采纳性的机器学习启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次证明了机器学习启发式可以在理论上保证可采纳性，为可采纳启发式的学习提供了一个新的范式。通过将最优规划中的组合优化问题转化为可学习的预测问题，为将深度学习方法引入安全关键的规划任务打开了可能。

title: Geometry-Preserving Unsupervised Alignment for Heterogeneous Foundation Models
summary: Foundation models have driven rapid progress in computer vision, yet the two dominant paradigms, vision-language foundation models (VLMs) and vision-only foundation models (VFMs), remain only partially compatible. VLMs offer language-grounded semantic alignment but are often visually coarse, while VFMs learn discriminative perceptual geometry but lack semantic grounding. We propose GPUA (Geometry-Preserving Unsupervised Alignment), a framework that integrates the complementary strengths of VFMs and VLMs. Inspired by cross-lingual alignment, GPUA treats VFM features as a visual language and learns an orthogonal mapping that translates the VFM space into the VLM semantic space, preserving geometry and narrowing the modality gap without labels or model parameter updates. GPUA is task-agnostic and requires only feature-level access to pretrained models. Experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate improved cross-model compatibility and strong gains in downstream zero-shot recognition and segmentation with negligible overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/Yuteam14/GPUA

AI.tldr: GPUA提出了一种无需标签和模型参数更新的几何保持无监督对齐框架，通过正交映射将视觉基础模型的特征空间翻译到视觉语言模型的语义空间中，实现了两类基础模型互补优势的集成，在零样本识别和分割任务上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前计算机视觉的两类基础模型——视觉语言基础模型和纯视觉基础模型——仅部分兼容：VLMs具备语言对齐的语义理解但视觉表征粗糙，VFMs学习判别性的感知几何特征但缺乏语义锚定，两者互补优势难以直接协同利用。
AI.method: GPUA受跨语言对齐启发，将VFM特征视为一种"视觉语言"，通过学习一个正交映射矩阵将VFM特征空间翻译到VLM语义空间中，该映射在保持几何结构的同时缩小模态差距，整个过程无需标签和模型参数更新，仅需访问预训练模型的特征级别输出，且任务无关。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试上的实验结果表明，GPUA显著提升了跨模型兼容性，并在下游零样本识别和零样本分割任务上取得了强劲的性能增益，同时引入的计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: GPUA提供了一种轻量级、无需监督的解决方案，有效弥合了VFM与VLM之间的表征鸿沟，为融合两类基础模型的互补能力开辟了新的路径，其任务无关性和低开销特性使其具有广泛的实际应用潜力。

title: SMADE-IE: Sparse Multi-Agent Framework with Evidence-Driven Debate for Zero-Shot Information Extraction
summary: Zero-shot information extraction (IE) with large language models (LLMs) has attracted increasing attention due to its flexibility in adapting to new schemas and domains without task-specific training. Existing approaches mainly rely on monolithic prompting, each-type prompting, or multi-agent debate. However, monolithic prompting often suffers from boundary and type errors, while each-type prompting and multi-agent debate introduce cross-type conflicts, redundant agent interactions, and substantial token overhead. To address these challenges, we propose SMADE-IE, a sparse and evidence-driven multi-agent framework for zero-shot IE. SMADE-IE first employs an Adaptive Mode Selector to dynamically route inputs into either a lightweight Global Extraction Mode or a Type-Centric Extraction Mode, reducing unnecessary type selection and reasoning noise. For conflicting predictions, we further introduce an Evidence-Driven Debate mechanism that structures arguments into Toulmin-style components and performs confidence aggregation through external evidence scoring and Bayesian updates. Experimental results on 9 benchmark datasets across NER, RE, and JERE tasks show that SMADE-IE consistently outperforms existing zero-shot IE baselines while also improving token efficiency through sparse agent selection and early-stopping debate.

AI.tldr: 提出SMADE-IE，一种稀疏且证据驱动的多智能体框架，用于零样本信息抽取，通过自适应模式选择器和证据驱动辩论机制，在NER、RE和JERE任务上超越现有基线并提升token效率。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本信息抽取方法（如整体提示、逐类型提示或多智能体辩论）存在边界与类型错误、跨类型冲突、冗余智能体交互和大量token开销等问题，亟需一种高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: SMADE-IE框架包含两个核心组件：一是自适应模式选择器（Adaptive Mode Selector），动态将输入路由到轻量级全局抽取模式或类型中心抽取模式，减少不必要的类型选择和推理噪声；二是证据驱动辩论机制（Evidence-Driven Debate），将冲突预测的结构化论点组织为Toulmin风格组件，并通过外部证据评分和贝叶斯更新进行置信度聚合。
AI.result: 在9个基准数据集上的命名实体识别、关系抽取和联合实体关系抽取任务中，SMADE-IE consistently优于现有零样本IE基线，同时通过稀疏智能体选择和早停辩论机制提升了token效率。
AI.conclusion: SMADE-IE通过自适应路由和证据驱动的辩论机制有效解决了零样本信息抽取中现有方法的效率和精度瓶颈，验证了稀疏化多智能体协作与结构化证据融合在IE任务中的有效性，为高效零样本信息抽取提供了新范式。

title: Plan First, Judge Later, Run Better: A DMAIC-Inspired Agentic System for Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown promise in automating complex data-analysis workflows, but their reliable deployment remains challenging in high-stakes industrial scenarios. Industrial anomaly detection (IAD) is essential for manufacturing quality, safety, and efficiency, yet existing LLM-based IAD agents mainly focus on execution while under-exploiting strategy formulation. Consequently, they struggle to handle heterogeneous modalities in a unified and cost-effective manner. Inspired by the DMAIC quality-management framework, we propose DMAIC-IAD (DMAIC-inspired Agentic Industrial Anomaly Detection), a "Plan First, Judge Later" multi-agent system that aligns LLM agents with structured industrial problem-solving. DMAIC-IAD distills heterogeneous references into standardized operating procedures (SOPs) before strategy generation, and introduces a pre-trained execution-free judge model to rank candidate strategies without costly runtime trials. Extensive experiments across four modalities show that DMAIC-IAD improves average detection performance over applicable agentic baselines by 37.76%.

AI.tldr: 提出DMAIC-IAD，一个受DMAIC质量管理框架启发的“先计划，后判断”多智能体系统，通过预生成标准化操作流程和无执行代价的评判模型，在四种模态上将工业异常检测的平均性能提升37.76%。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于大语⾔模型的工业异常检测智能体主要侧重于执⾏环节，而对策略制定环节利用不足，因此在面对异构多模态数据时难以实现统一且成本有效的处理，阻碍了其在⾼风险工业场景中的可靠部署。
AI.method: 借鉴DMAIC质量管理框架，设计“先计划，后判断”的多智能体系统DMAIC-IAD，其首先将异构参考信息蒸馏为标准化操作流程（SOP），再基于SOP生成候选检测策略；同时引入一个预训练的无执行评判模型，在不进行实际运行试验的情况下对候选策略进行排序。
AI.result: 在四种模态上的广泛实验表明，DMAIC-IAD相较于可用的智能体基线的平均检测性能提升了37.76%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将结构化工业问题求解框架融入LLM智能体系统能够显著提升异构多模态异常检测的统一性与成本效益，为LLM智能体在⾼风险工业场景中的可靠部署提供了有前景的⽅向。

title: Stateful Visual Encoders for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in multi-image, multi-turn agentic settings where decisions depend on visual changes. However, in existing open-weight VLMs, visual comparisons happen only inside the language model, while the visual encoder itself remains stateless: each image is encoded independently, without access to the prior visual context. As a result, small but task-critical changes may be attenuated before the language model has a chance to compare them, especially when those changes do not affect the high-level semantics of the scene. We introduce a Stateful Visual Encoder, which conditions each visual representation on prior visual features. Under supervised finetuning, VLMs equipped with stateful encoders achieve consistent improvements on controlled tasks involving cross-image spatial aggregation, multi-object visual differencing, and visual trajectory behavior cloning. These improvements are consistent across input resolutions, language model sizes, and VLM backbones. Finally, we validate our model on real-world tasks, including longitudinal radiology, fine-grained image comparison, and remote sensing, where stateful encoders consistently improve generalist VLM baselines and can match or surpass specialized models in selected domains. Project page: https://statefulvisualencoders.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出状态化视觉编码器（Stateful Visual Encoder），使视觉编码器在编码当前图像时能够参考先前的视觉特征，从而改善VLM在多图像、多轮交互场景中对视觉变化的感知与比较能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放权重视觉语言模型（VLM）在多图像、多轮agentic场景中，视觉编码器是无状态的，每个图像被独立编码，无法访问先前的视觉上下文。这使得对任务关键但仅影响低层视觉细节的变化（如物体位置微调）容易被弱化或丢失，语言模型难以进行有效比较。
AI.method: 提出Stateful Visual Encoder，通过在编码当前图像时引入先前视觉特征的上下文信息，使视觉编码器具备状态感知能力。该方法兼容监督微调，可直接替换现有VLM中的视觉编码器模块。
AI.result: 在跨图像空间聚合、多目标视觉差异比较、视觉轨迹行为克隆等受控任务上，配备状态化编码器的VLM在监督微调下取得一致性提升。这些提升在不同输入分辨率、语言模型规模和VLM骨干网络上均保持稳定。在真实任务（纵向放射影像、细粒度图像比较、遥感）上，该方法持续优于通用VLM基线，并在部分领域达到或超越专用模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 状态化视觉编码器是一种轻量且有效的改进方案，能够在不改变VLM整体架构的前提下增强其对跨图像视觉变化的感知能力，为多图像理解任务提供了一条实用路径。

title: DuDi: Dual-Signal Distillation with Cross-Lingual Verbalizer
summary: Small language models (SLMs) are efficient and scalable, but their multilingual capabilities degrade severely at sub-billion scales, especially for Southeast Asian (SEA) languages. We introduce DuDi, a dual-signal multilingual distillation framework that combines an online sequence-level signal with off-policy and on-policy token-level signals. DuDi further uses a cross-lingual verbalizer to refine teacher feedback and improve teacher-student transferability in multilingual settings. Experiments on SEA-HELM across multiple model families, scales, and teacher-student settings show that DuDi consistently outperforms competitive distillation baselines. Ablations and analyses confirm that sequence-level optimization, token-level supervision, and cross-lingual verbalization provide complementary and transferable learning signals for multilingual SLMs.

AI.tldr: DuDi提出了一种双信号多语言蒸馏框架，结合在线序列级信号与离策略及在策略的令牌级信号，并引入跨语言口头化器（cross-lingual verbalizer）优化教师反馈，显著提升了子十亿参数规模下多语言小语言模型（尤其是东南亚语言）的性能。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型（SLMs）虽高效且可扩展，但在子十亿参数规模下多语言能力严重退化，尤其对东南亚（SEA）语言表现不佳；现有蒸馏方法难以有效将教师模型的多语言知识迁移至极小规模的学生模型。
AI.method: DuDi提出双信号多语言蒸馏框架：结合在线序列级信号（sequence-level signal）与离策略及在策略的令牌级信号（off-policy and on-policy token-level signals）；并引入跨语言口头化器（cross-lingual verbalizer）来细化教师反馈，提升教师—学生模型在 multilingual 场景下的知识可迁移性。
AI.result: 在SEA-HELM基准上，跨越多个模型家族、模型尺度及教师—学生设置下的实验表明，DuDi持续优于竞争性的蒸馏基线；消融与分析进一步确认，序列级优化、令牌级监督与跨语言口头化提供了互补且可迁移的多语言学习信号。
AI.conclusion: DuDi框架证实了多粒度蒸馏信号（序列级与令牌级）的互补性，以及跨语言口头化器在改善教师反馈传递中的关键作用，为构建高效多语言小语言模型提供了有效路径。

title: Parthenon Law: A Self-Evolving Legal-Agent Framework
summary: As agents grow more capable, legal-domain LLM agents promise to turn document-heavy matters into reviewable work products -- yet reliable deployment faces three obstacles: no large-scale evidence on how today's strongest model-and-harness combinations behave on end-to-end legal matters; no agent architecture adapted to the legal vertical, only general-purpose harnesses; and, in a setting that keeps shifting with new facts, authorities, and deadlines, no mechanism for systems to learn from their own outcomes. We address each. A large-scale empirical study on Harvey LAB -- $12{,}510$ agent trajectories -- shows that even frontier agents remain far from completing matters in a single pass: per-criterion accuracy climbs with stronger models while strict matter completion stalls. We then introduce \textsc{Parthenon}, a self-evolving legal-agent framework that factors Model, Harness, Agent roles, legal Knowledge, deterministic Tools, and procedural Skills into auditable surfaces for source traceability, date and number grounding, deliverable compliance, and issue closure. Finally, an anti-leakage learning loop converts scored failures into task-agnostic edits to skills, tools, and knowledge, letting the system improve with experience -- as a firm refines its checklists and playbooks after each matter -- without touching model weights. Across our large-scale empirical analysis, \textsc{Parthenon} substantially improves the performance of state-of-the-art models and harnesses on legal-matter tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实证研究（12,510条轨迹）揭示了当前前沿法律AI代理在端到端法律事务完成上的局限性，并提出了Parthenon——一种能够通过反泄漏学习循环从经验中自我进化的法律代理框架，显著提升了最先进模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管法律领域的LLM代理有望将文档密集型事务转化为可审查的工作产品，但可靠部署面临三大障碍：缺乏关于最强模型与工具框架组合在端到端法律事务上行为的大规模证据；缺乏专为法律垂直领域设计的代理架构，仅有通用工具框架；以及在事实、权威和截止日期不断变化的环境中，缺乏让系统从自身结果中学习的机制。
AI.method: 首先，在Harvey LAB上进行了包含12,510条代理轨迹的大规模实证研究，评估前沿模型在端到端法律事务上的表现。其次，提出了Parthenon框架，该框架将模型、工具框架、代理角色、法律知识、确定性工具和程序化技能分解为可审计的表面，支持源追溯、日期和数字锚定、交付物合规性和问题关闭。最后，设计了反泄漏学习循环，将评分失败转化为与任务无关的技能、工具和知识编辑，使系统在不触碰模型权重的情况下从经验中改进。
AI.result: 大规模实证研究表明，即使是前沿代理在单次通过中仍远未完成法律事务：每个标准的准确率随模型能力增强而提升，但严格的事务完成率停滞不前。Parthenon框架在相同任务上显著提升了最先进模型和工具框架的性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前最强法律AI代理在端到端事务完成上仍存在显著差距，而Parthenon通过分解架构设计和反泄漏学习循环，为法律代理系统的持续改进提供了可行路径——类似于律师事务所每次案件后完善其检查清单和操作手册——且无需修改模型权重。

title: Hyper-ICL: Attention Calibration with Hyperbolic Anchor Distillation for Multimodal In-Context Learning
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Multimodal In-Context Learning (ICL) has emerged as a practical inference paradigm for Multimodal Large Language Models, where a small set of interleaved image-text In-Context Demonstrations (ICDs) conditions the model to solve new tasks. Despite its flexibility, multimodal ICL incurs high inference latency and suffers from instability due to sensitivity to demonstration formatting, ordering, and content. To address these limitations, we propose Hyper-ICL, a lightweight, training-based framework for demonstration-free multimodal ICL that reconstructs demonstration effects directly without requiring ICDs at inference time. Hyper-ICL learns a parameter-efficient low-rank logit-level adapter that calibrates attention distributions to better match demonstration-induced attention redistribution. To capture how demonstration influence varies across queries, we introduce a query-adaptive modulation mechanism that adaptively controls intervention strength at token level across layers and heads based on the current query. Finally, we propose a layer-wise hyperbolic anchor distillation loss that aligns intermediate student features to a demonstration-conditioned teacher via Lorentz geodesic distance. This loss encourages the student to reconstruct the demonstration-query relationships induced by ICDs. Extensive experiments across six different multimodal benchmarks (including VQAv2, OK-VQA, and COCO Caption) demonstrate that Hyper-ICL consistently improves accuracy and stability over vanilla ICL and existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出Hyper-ICL框架，通过轻量级训练实现无需演示的多模态上下文学习，利用低秩logit适配器、查询自适应调制和双曲锚点蒸馏损失，在多个基准上提升准确率和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 多模态上下文学习（ICL）虽然灵活，但存在推理延迟高、对演示格式/顺序/内容敏感导致不稳定的问题，亟需一种无需推理时提供上下文演示（ICD）的高效且稳定的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出Hyper-ICL框架：1）学习参数高效的低秩logit级适配器，校准注意力分布以匹配演示诱导的注意力重分布；2）引入查询自适应调制机制，在token级别按层和头自适应控制干预强度；3）提出逐层双曲锚点蒸馏损失，通过Lorentz测地距离对齐学生与演示条件教师之间的中间特征，重建演示-查询关系。
AI.result: 在VQAv2、OK-VQA、COCO Caption等六个多模态基准上的实验表明，Hyper-ICL在准确率和稳定性上一致优于原始ICL及现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明了通过训练方式将演示效应直接重构到模型参数中是可行的，可在消除推理时演示开销的同时提升性能与稳定性，为高效多模态ICL提供了新范式。

title: Rethinking Continual Experience Internalization for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: Experience internalization converts contextual experience from past interactions into reusable parametric capability, offering a promising path toward continual learning in large language models (LLMs). While prior work has predominantly focused on single-iteration transfer, we discover that under multi-iteration experience learning, existing methods suffer from a progressive capability collapse rather than compounding improvement. We systematically examine this failure through three vital dimensions of experience internalization: (1) Experience Granularity: We find that principle-level experience is more durable than instance-level experience, as it effectively abstracts transferable strategies away from trajectory-specific details. (2) Experience Injection Pattern: Our analysis reveals that step-wise injection significantly outperforms global injection by aligning experience with intermediate decision states, a property that is critical for long-horizon tool use. (3) Internalization Regime: We demonstrate that off-policy context-distillation on high-quality teacher trajectories provides a substantially more stable training signal than on-policy context-distillation, which is inherently limited by local corrections on student-induced flawed states. Together, these insights yield a simple yet robust recipe for stable and sustainable experience internalization, providing concrete guidance for engineering self-evolving and continually learning LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多轮经验学习下现有经验内化方法存在渐进式能力崩溃，并从经验粒度、注入模式和内化机制三个维度系统分析了失败原因，提出了基于原则级经验、逐步注入和离策略上下文蒸馏的稳健内化方案。
AI.motivation: 现有经验内化方法主要关注单次迁移，而在多轮经验学习场景下，这些方法会出现渐进式能力崩溃而非累积提升，缺乏对可持续经验内化的系统性理解与有效方案。
AI.method: 从三个关键维度系统分析经验内化失败原因：(1) 经验粒度：对比原则级与实例级经验的持久性差异；(2) 经验注入模式：对比逐步注入与全局注入的效果；(3) 内化机制：对比离策略上下文蒸馏与在策略上下文蒸馏的训练稳定性。
AI.result: 原则级经验比实例级经验更持久；逐步注入显著优于全局注入，尤其在长程工具使用任务中；离策略上下文蒸馏提供比在策略上下文蒸馏更稳定的训练信号。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一套简单而稳健的经验内化方法：采用原则级经验、逐步注入模式和离策略上下文蒸馏，为构建可自我进化、持续学习的大语言模型提供了具体指导。

title: Fog of Love: Engineering Virtuous Agent Behavior with Affinity-based Reinforcement Learning in a Game Environment
summary: Instilling virtuous behavior in artificial intelligence has seen increasing interest. One of the techniques proposed is known as affinity-based reinforcement learning, which uses policy regularization on the objective function to incentivize virtuous actions without being fully dependent on the reward function design. Thus far, this technique has been demonstrated to be effective in grid worlds and toy-problem environments with minimal state and action spaces. To expand this research to more sophisticated environments, we introduce a two-player multi-agent environment based on the role-playing board game known as Fog of Love. In this environment, two agents compete to fulfill their individual virtues, while also cooperating to satisfy their relationship. Given the multi-agent nature, this is a complex problem where multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient agents neither compete nor cooperate successfully. We present evidence that localized affinities enhance agent performance in achieving both competitive and cooperative objectives, resulting from superior overall scores in both domains. This not only results in virtuous choices but also clarifies an agent's teleology and makes its behavior human-level interpretable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于局部亲和力的多智能体强化学习方法，将affinity-based RL扩展到Fog of Love棋盘游戏环境，通过策略正则化使智能体在竞争与合作的双目标场景中实现更高得分和可解释的类人行为。
AI.motivation: 现有affinity-based RL方法仅在网格世界和极小状态动作空间的玩具问题中验证有效性，缺乏对复杂多智能体环境的研究，且多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（MADDPG）在兼具竞争与合作目标的任务中表现不佳。
AI.method: 基于角色扮演桌游Fog of Love构建双人多智能体环境，两个智能体需在满足各自美德目标（竞争）的同时维护关系（合作）；采用局部亲和力（localized affinities）对目标函数进行策略正则化，以激励美德行为而非仅依赖奖励函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，局部亲和力策略显著提升了智能体在竞争和合作双目标上的综合得分，优于标准MADDPG基线；该方法不仅引导智能体做出美德选择，还使其行为具有人类级别的可解释性，明确了智能体的目的论（teleology）。
AI.conclusion: 局部亲和力机制能有效解决多智能体环境下竞争与合作目标的平衡问题，为实现类人美德行为提供可扩展框架，同时提升了模型的可解释性，为将伦理AI方法推广至复杂现实场景奠定基础。

title: 3DThinkVLA: Endowing Vision-Language-Action Models with Latent 3D Priors via 3D-Thinking-Guided Co-training
summary: We propose a 3D-thinking-guided co-training framework that enables vision-language-action (VLA) models to perform 3D spatial reasoning implicitly during action prediction. Our core insight is that 3D geometry perception and 3D spatial reasoning are distinct capabilities that can be disentangled and injected at different feature hierarchies. During training, three tightly coupled components work in concert primarily within the latent space: (1) To gain geometric priors, a latent 3D geometry perception module aligns intermediate visual features with a 3D foundation model, acquiring low-level geometric cues without architectural modifications to the VLM backbone. (2) Complementing this, an online 3D reasoning distillation module mitigates the prompt-induced reasoning gap via a shared reasoning anchor token. During 3D VLM co-training, this anchor is emitted as the first output token to robustly encode spatial priors. During VLA training, it serves as an input token inserted between the task and action instructions, transferring high-level spatial thinking from explicit teacher reasoning prompts to student action prompts without chain-of-thought text generation. (3) These disentangled geometric and reasoning features are then united by a spatially augmented action integration, which jointly injects them into the action-query tokens as hierarchical spatial conditions to prevent action shortcuts. At deployment, our method retains only its lightweight adapters to perform implicit 3D reasoning, discarding the 3D foundation model and the teacher branch used for supervision. Consequently, it operates purely on 2D images without 3D sensors, external models, or explicit text generation while preventing catastrophic forgetting of the pretrained VLM, achieving state-of-the-art performance on LIBERO, LIBERO-PLUS, SimplerEnv, and real-world manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种3D思维引导的协同训练框架，通过解耦3D几何感知与空间推理能力并在不同特征层级注入，使VLA模型在动作预测中隐式进行3D空间推理，无需3D传感器、外部模型或显式文本生成，在多个基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在动作预测中缺乏3D空间推理能力，且3D几何感知与3D空间推理这两种能力常被混为一谈；此外，引入3D信息往往需要修改模型架构、依赖3D传感器或生成显式推理文本，导致推理效率低且可能引发灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出3D思维引导的协同训练框架，包含三个紧耦合组件：1) 潜在3D几何感知模块，通过将中间视觉特征与3D基础模型对齐来获取低层几何线索，不修改VLM骨干架构；2) 在线3D推理蒸馏模块，利用共享推理锚标记在3D VLM协同训练时编码空间先验，并在VLA训练时作为输入标记插入任务指令与动作指令之间，将显式教师推理提示中的高层空间思维迁移至学生动作提示；3) 空间增强动作整合模块，将解耦后的几何与推理特征联合注入动作查询标记作为层级空间条件，防止动作捷径。部署时仅保留轻量适配器，丢弃3D基础模型和教师分支。
